$comment: schema_version=1.0.0 | Added 2026-06-03 | Integrity Bridge Layer. Defines the proposal document an agent submits to integrity-bridge.mjs before calling lease-manager.mjs acquire.
title: NOVA 2.5 Scheduler Proposal
description: A scheduling proposal submitted by an agent to the integrity-bridge for validation. The agent derives this from queue.json after reading the scheduler output. The bridge validates that the world state has not changed since the scheduler ran, then issues a bridge_token authorizing the subsequent lease acquisition.

proposal.description: Input to integrity-bridge.mjs validate command. Produced by the agent from the queue entry it intends to act on.

task_id.description: The task the agent intends to acquire.

agent_id.description: The agent requesting the lease. Must be registered (ACTIVE) in agents/registry.json.

role.description: The role the agent intends to fill. Must match the needed_role for this task's current state per scheduler_policy.json.

scheduler_sequence.description: scheduler_sequence from the queue.json the agent read. Used to detect stale proposals from an older scheduler run.

world_snapshot_hash.description: world_snapshot.world_snapshot_hash from the queue.json the agent read. The integrity-bridge recomputes this hash from the current file state and rejects the proposal if it differs — ensuring the world has not changed since the scheduler ran.

ok.description: true=passed, false=failed, null=not applicable (check was skipped).

bridge_response.description: Output of integrity-bridge.mjs validate. Contains the validation result, per-check details, and (if valid) a bridge_token authorizing the lease acquisition.

valid.description: True only when ALL checks pass. The agent MUST NOT call lease-manager.mjs acquire if valid=false.

reason.description: First failed check reason, for quick error display. Null when valid=true.

bridge_token.description: SHA-256(task_id:agent_id:role:world_snapshot_hash:evaluated_at). Present only when valid=true. Pass to lease-manager.mjs acquire via --bridge-token. Expires at expires_at.

expires_at.description: When the bridge_token expires. Null when valid=false. Lease acquisition MUST complete before this timestamp.

evaluated_at.description: When the bridge evaluation was performed. Wall-clock timestamp (informational only — never used in deterministic scheduling logic).

proposal.description: Echo of the submitted proposal, for traceability.

checks.description: Per-check results. All checks run regardless of earlier failures.

check_set.description: The six validation checks performed by integrity-bridge.mjs, in evaluation order.

world_snapshot_match.description: B1: recomputed world_snapshot_hash == proposal.world_snapshot_hash. Fails if any input file changed since the scheduler ran.

scheduler_sequence_match.description: B2: proposal.scheduler_sequence == scheduler_report.scheduler_sequence. Fails if the scheduler has re-run since the queue was read.

task_schedulable.description: B3: task is still in a schedulable state (TODO or REVIEW_LOCKED) in registry.json.

agent_active.description: B4: agent is ACTIVE in agents/registry.json. Fails if the agent was suspended or deregistered.

slot_available.description: B5: no ACTIVE lease exists in agents/leases.json for (task_id, role_category). Fails if another agent already acquired the slot.

review_gate.description: B6: only evaluated for REVIEW/ARCHITECT roles. review_legal=true per task_runtime_state.schema.json. null (N/A) for IMPLEMENTATION/REFACTOR.
